# provision

## Plugin reference

- Description: Install-time provisioning registry + runner: discovers each plugin's provision/index.ts and runs it during postinstall.
- Core:
  - Uses: `framework/tooling/collected-dir.defineCollectedDir`
  - Exports (types): `CollectedEntry`
  - Exports (values):
    - `provisionCollectedDir`
    - `provisionEntries`
